title: MailerLite vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite and Moosend. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing tool is best for your business.
intro: MailerLite and Moosend are two popular freemium email marketing platforms competing for small business attention. Both offer generous free tiers and affordable paid plans starting at $9/month, but they excel in different areas. This comparison helps you decide which platform aligns best with your email marketing needs.
choose_a_if: You need strong e-commerce integrations and pop-up functionality
You prefer an intuitive drag-and-drop editor optimized for beginners
Survey tools are important for your marketing strategy
choose_b_if: You want unlimited emails even on the free plan
Real-time analytics and A/B testing are priorities
You need advanced automation workflows at a low cost

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your priorities. MailerLite excels for e-commerce businesses and beginners with its intuitive interface and native integrations. Moosend offers better value with unlimited emails on its free plan and slightly higher ratings on G2, making it ideal for cost-conscious marketers.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Moosend?
faq.a: Both start at $9/month for paid plans, but Moosend provides better value because its free tier includes unlimited emails, while MailerLite restricts email volume on free accounts. If you stay on the free tier, Moosend is the clear cost winner.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list imports and exports. Most migrations are straightforward, though you may need to rebuild automations manually since workflow structures differ between platforms. Contact their support teams for specific migration guidance.
